positive: A minimalist geometric forest scene. Stylized trees with sharp, clean silhouette forms, forming a rhythmic pattern. The composition is highly symmetrical and centered, designed for optimal repeat pattern printing. Use a limited color palette of deep sapphire blue, earthy terracotta, and creamy off-white. The texture should evoke a crisp linocut or sophisticated vector art style, with clear, defined edges and strong, uniform contrast against a white background. The mood is whimsical yet sophisticated, conveying natural structure and modern design.
